column1: # Alt-F4 reverts each /WGDOI* mutation. One journal entry per change.
# Seed a comma cell so we can see Punctuation changes.
# Rendering only changes when the cell uses D4/D5; just verify the
# setting is back to A after Alt-F4 by exercising another change.
# /WGDOIN P then Alt-F4: sign style restored.
